expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the constraint and summary requirement and ties both to the skill snapshot contract: “Supporting issues must remain `context_only_no_defect_analysis` (no defect analysis/routing based on support issues). Supporting issues must still produce summaries (and relation-map artifacts) under `context/`.” It further cites contract language: “Support-only Jira policy: Supporting Jira issues are context evidence only… must remain in `context_only_no_defect_analysis` mode.” and Phase 1 post-validation includes “support relation map, support summaries, and non-defect routing.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md frames checks as “phase1 focus” and lists Phase 1 artifacts/validations (spawn requests when supporting_issue_keys provided; Phase 1 --post validation for support relation map + summaries + non-defect routing). result.md also anchors the report to Phase 1: “This case focuses on Phase 1 behavior for supporting issues” and cites Phase 1 requirements including “generate … support-only Jira digestion requests when provided” and “Phase 1 `--post`: validate … support relation map, support summaries, and non-defect routing.”
